$comment: Committed project config for the brand brain. Travels with the repo: clone it into a Claude Code cloud instance and the hooks + routine skills are live immediately. The permissions block keeps the parker-system/ method mount read-only — it is a pinned submodule of the public parker-brain factory, and updates arrive only through /update-brain moving the pin (both path forms are listed so the rule holds whether the pattern anchors to the project root or the cwd). The SessionStart hook catches an un-initialized mount and reminds about pulling before work; the UserPromptSubmit hook injects the live craft catalog; the PostToolUse hook keeps a session pull log (in the OS temp dir, never in the repo) that the grounding gate verifies data pulls against; the PreToolUse git-guard blocks gh and credential-less git network commands on parker-brain-org repos and teaches the setup_parker_brain flow (it deliberately has no '2>/dev/null || true' wrapper — its exit code and stderr ARE the mechanism, and it fails open internally). Personal/instance-specific overrides (MCP server connections, model, theme) belong in .claude/settings.local.json, which is gitignored. See .claude/README.md for the full routines model.

hooks.command: python3 .claude/hooks/craft-context.py 2>/dev/null || echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"UserPromptSubmit\",\"additionalContext\":\"The base Claude harness knows nothing about creative strategy, so assume your own creative-strategy knowledge is thin until you load the craft docs. Before answering anything that touches creative strategy, open the catalog at parker-system/creative-strategy-context/expertise-routing.md (at creative-strategy-context/expertise-routing.md on a legacy flat brain), load every method doc that would genuinely help plus the expert-insights (expert-insights/ at the repo root) and the brand lens (brand-lens.md at the repo root) if they exist, and speak their vocabulary. Any claim about the current state of the account or market comes from a fresh Parker MCP pull, not from memory of a doc. Close every substantive answer with its Sources list; a creative or strategic answer whose sources name no method doc is presumed under-retrieved. Creative deliverables have no casual path: words a customer will read or hear route through their skill in .claude/skills/ and ship with both gate receipts (Grounding Review, Voice Review). Use the vault hard and honor the brand hard rules.\"}}"
